name: AMPHENOL CORP /DE/
summary: Amphenol Corporation is one of the world's largest designers, manufacturers and marketers of electrical, electronic and fiber optic connectors and interconnect systems, antennas, sensors and sensor-based products, and coaxial, high-speed, fiber optic and specialty cable. Incorporated in Delaware in 1986 with predecessor businesses founded in 1932, the company operates three segments: Communications Solutions (52% of 2025 net sales), Harsh Environment Solutions (26%), and Interconnect and Sensor Systems (22%), serving markets including IT/data communications, defense, automotive, and mobile devices.

products.name: Fiber Optic Interconnect Products
products.description: Fiber optic connectors and interconnect systems for communications and harsh environment applications.

products.name: High-Speed Interconnect Products
products.description: High-speed connectors and interconnect systems for data communications and IT infrastructure.

products.name: Radio Frequency Interconnect Products
products.description: RF connectors and interconnect systems for communications networks and consumer devices.

products.name: Coaxial and Specialty Cable
products.description: Coaxial, fiber optic, power and specialty cable for communications and industrial applications.

products.name: Antennas
products.description: Consumer device antennas and network infrastructure antennas including base station antennas and distributed antenna systems.

products.name: Sensors and Sensor-based Products
products.description: Force, gas, moisture, level, position, pressure, temperature and vibration sensors for diverse end markets.

products.name: Backplane Interconnect Systems
products.description: Value-add backplane interconnect systems for harsh environment and interconnect/sensor applications.

products.name: Printed Circuit Boards and Assemblies
products.description: Flexible and rigid printed circuit boards and assemblies for harsh environment applications.

products.name: Busbars and Power Distribution Systems
products.description: Power interconnect and distribution products for the Interconnect and Sensor Systems segment.

products.name: Cable Assemblies and Harnesses
products.description: Value-add cable assemblies and harnesses across all three business segments.
